title: Rich Italian Fennel Sausage Stir-fry
description: A rich and crispy filipino dish featuring sous-vide cooked Italian fennel sausages as the star of this stir-fry recipe, perfect for post-workout meals.
instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 150°F (65°C) for the sausages.

Prepare a marinade by mixing soy sauce, fish sauce, vegetable oil, minced garlic, ginger, chili paste, corn starch, and water in a bowl. Place the Italian Fennel Sausages in this marinade overnight or for at least 4 hours to infuse flavors.
After marinating, place the sausages in the sous-vide machine and cook until they reach an internal temperature of 150°F (65°C). Allow them to rest before slicing thin.
Heat a wok over medium-high heat. Add vegetable oil and sliced sausages. Stir-fry for about 3 minutes, shaking the wok continuously to prevent sticking.
Add minced garlic and ginger into the wok and stir-fry until fragrant and slightly golden (about 1 minute).
Drizzle with soy sauce mixture over the sausages in the wok. Stir gently to coat them evenly.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves and peanuts if using, then serve immediately.
